related_condition: critical TTC or unsafe stopping distance
mitigation: Generate WARNING or EMERGENCY_BRAKE according to thresholds

related_condition: state is SAFE or CAUTION but brake_request is generated
mitigation: Allow brake_request only in EMERGENCY_BRAKE state

related_condition: TTC is below warning threshold before WARNING state is generated
mitigation: Use TTC and stopping distance together for warning classification

hazard_statement: Brake request is generated outside the intended ODD
related_condition: scenario is outside low-speed urban ODD
mitigation: Define ODD and document out-of-scope conditions

hazard_statement: Emergency brake request is not generated when collision risk is critical
related_condition: TTC <= emergency threshold or distance <= 0.8 stopping distance

hazard_statement: Emergency brake request is generated when situation is not critical
Warning state remains SAFE despite unsafe TTC or stopping-distance condition
related_condition: TTC or distance violates defined thresholds
mitigation: Check warning state against threshold table

related_condition: friction coefficient is too high for wet-road case
mitigation: Use dry and wet friction assumptions

hazard_statement: Actuator or controller delay is not considered
mitigation: Include actuator delay in stopping-distance calculation

hazard_statement: System is used outside supported speed range
mitigation: Limit project validity to 0 to 50 km/h
